steps.clue: Recapture both wards and remove the gate glyphs.
Defeat the Oni, open the sanctum, and charge the World Seed.
Build the Maneki-Neko and free the Nekomancer.
Light all eleven lanterns, then place and solve the Fox Mask.
Gather the three suspect items and place them in the Meditation Room.
Complete the accomplice and poison evidence sets in order.
Finish the cup and flag trials, solve the murder board, and purify the sword.
Follow the new kite and defeat Nyxara.
